tagline: Your Trusted Full-Service Pool Maintenance and Repair Experts in Arizona

hero.headline:
Veteran-Owned Pool Care Arizona
Families Trust
hero.subheadline: For 14 years, U.S. Army veteran Kevin Swafford and the Malibu Pool Service team have kept East Valley pools sparkling clean. From weekly maintenance to emergency repairs, we handle it all so you can enjoy your backyard oasis worry-free.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From routine maintenance to complex repairs, Malibu Pool Service handles every aspect of pool ownership so you can stop worrying and start swimming.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Thorough weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks that keep your pool crystal clear and swim-ready all year in the Arizona heat.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, motors, filters, heaters, and salt systems. Most repairs completed same-visit to get you back in the water fast.

cards.title: Green Pool Muck Outs
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swamp-green? We restore even the worst pools to sparkling condition within days. Emergency response available.

cards.title: Acid Washes & Deep Cleaning
cards.description: Professional acid washes and chlorine rinses that strip away calcium buildup, stubborn stains, and algae for a fresh, renewed pool surface.

cards.title: Filter & Salt System Service
cards.description: Complete cleaning, maintenance, and replacement of pool filters and salt chlorination systems to ensure optimal water quality and circulation.

cards.title: Plumbing & Heater Repair
cards.description: From blocked pipes and leaks to heater installations, we solve the underground and mechanical issues that keep your pool system running strong.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll come assess your pool, give you honest recommendations, and provide a no-pressure quote — usually within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our licensed, insured technicians show up on time, every time. Weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, equipment checks — your pool is in veteran hands.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: No more testing chemicals or scrubbing walls. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready while you spend time on what actually matters.

about.label: Why Arizona Pool Owners Choose Us
about.headline: Veteran-Owned, Community-Trusted Pool Care Since 2011
about.description: Founded by Kevin Swafford, a U.S. Army veteran with over 14 years of hands-on pool experience, Malibu Pool Service and Repair has been the East Valley's go-to pool company since 2011. We are fully licensed, fully insured, and BBB A+ rated. We proudly offer discounts to military members, police officers, and firefighters because we believe in taking care of those who serve.

features.title: Licensed & Fully Insured
features.description: We carry full Arizona pool contractor licensing and comprehensive insurance, giving you complete peace of mind with every service visit.

features.title: Military & First Responder Discounts
features.description: As a veteran-owned company, we proudly offer special pricing to active military, veterans, police officers, and firefighters.

features.title: Honest Service, Fair Pricing
features.description: No upselling, no unnecessary repairs. We tell you exactly what your pool needs and charge a fair price for quality work — every time.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get a custom quote based on your pool size and needs. No contracts, no hidden fees — just honest service from a veteran-owned team.

guarantee.headline: Our Veteran's Honor Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will come back to make it right at no additional charge. We built this business on integrity and honest work, and we stand behind every job we do. Your satisfaction is not negotiable.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in Apache Junction, Mesa, Chandler, and the East Valley are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response. Just call us at 602-748-0544.

faqs.question: Do you offer military or first responder discounts?
faqs.answer: Yes! As a U.S. Army veteran-owned business, we proudly offer discounts to active military members, veterans, police officers, and firefighters. Just let us know when you request your quote.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Malibu Pool Service and Repair is a fully licensed pool contractor in the State of Arizona and carries comprehensive insurance. We are also BBB A+ rated for your peace of mind.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Apache Junction, Mesa, Chandler, Gilbert, Tempe, Ahwatukee, San Tan Valley, Queen Creek, and the greater Phoenix metropolitan area. If you are in the East Valley, chances are we cover your area.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: No contracts required. We believe in earning your business with every visit. You can adjust or cancel service anytime with no fees and no hassle. We keep customers because of quality, not paperwork.

testimonials.name: Kevin R.
testimonials.text: Kevin at Malibu has been fantastic to work with! He installed a new heater and has helped me adjust things for my pool. He also has given me great advice for overall maintenance.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: Quick diagnostics and effective service. They identified the problem with our pump right away and had it fixed the same day. Very professional and reasonably priced.

testimonials.name: Dave T.
testimonials.text: We had a green pool after being away for a month. Malibu Pool Service came out quickly and had it looking brand new within a couple days. Highly recommend their muck out service.
